title: galinsoga serrata
intro: Galinsoga serrata, also known as prickly galliard or serrated galinsoga, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Galinsoga serrata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments.
